title: Health Canada evaluation reports - Canada.ca
content:
## Health Canada evaluation reports
The Office of Audit and Evaluation conducts evaluations that provide credible, timely, neutral evidence to support government accountability and decision-making on policy, expenditure management, and program improvements within Health Canada and the Public Health Agency of Canada.
Publication of these evaluation reports is consistent with the Government of Canada Policy on Results which requires government organizations to make reports and Management Response and Action Plans (MRAPs) accessible to the public.

## Approved evaluation reports
The following evaluation reports have been approved by the Deputy Minister of Health Canada.
Effective February 2013, all Health Canada Evaluation Reports are posted on this website.
To obtain copies of Health Canada Evaluation Reports completed prior to February 2013, please refer to the listing below and contact the Office of Audits and Evaluation .
